headline: Cat Learns To Answer The Door, Now Screens Guests, Refuses Entry To 'Unapproved Visitors'
summary: 'The cat decides who enters,' the owner said. 'He's very selective.' He has a list of approved guests.
fullBody: Mr. Whiskers has learned to answer the door. He now screens visitors. 'He checks who it is,' his owner said. 'He has a list of approved guests.' Unapproved guests are met with a stare. 'He's very judgmental,' one visitor said. Mr. Whiskers has a list. 'The mailman is on the list,' the owner said. 'The pizza delivery is not.' Mr. Whiskers is now the doorman.
